mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `erp_material` ( `material_id`, `model_number`, `color`, `create_time`, `update_time`, `del_flag` ) VALUES
( #{item.materialId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.modelNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.color, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), '0' )

INSERT INTO `erp_material` ( `material_id`, `model_number`, `color`, `create_time`, `update_time`, `del_flag` ) VALUES
( #{item.materialId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.modelNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.color, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), '0' )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `model_number` = VALUES(`model_number`), `color` = VALUES(`color`), `update_time` = NOW(), `del_flag` = '0'
